error_signature: poor typing experience due to rapid input
title: Poor typing experience with Supabase text input
symptom: When typing quickly in a long text input, the changes do not register smoothly, causing a lag in user experience.
applies_when: Using a long text input field
Data is being sent to Supabase on every keystroke
not_this_if: Typing is slow and does not trigger rapid requests
root_cause: The application is sending requests to Supabase on every keystroke, which can overwhelm the system and lead to delays in updating the input field, resulting in a poor user experience.
fix_steps: Implement a debounce function on the text input field
Set the debounce time to 1 second
Test the input field to ensure it updates smoothly after typing pauses
agent_instruction: Add a debounce function to the long text input field to improve typing responsiveness.
